examples: The report names three seabirds in jeopardy - the Kittlitz's murrelet, spectacled eider and ivory gull;
But the committee on the status of wildlife in Canada found that if logging continued at the current rate the marbled murrelet could be extinct in "a matter of decades."
Celebrities like actor Woody Harrelson were arrested at demonstrations that also protested the danger to the spotted owl and marbled murrelet populations.
